name: mr-review-companion
description: Build a single self-contained HTML review companion for a GitLab merge request with three tabs: a plain-language Summary for non-technical readers (includes a rollback plan when the MR has migrations), a Diff tab with individually collapsible files and cross-impact WHY prose, and a QA tab written in plain user-action language with checkbox checklists so QA engineers know exactly what to click and what to look for.
